message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: Kubernetes 1.24: Token-handling code assumes auto-created mission (#754)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-8320-kubernetes-1-24-token-handling-code-assumes-auto-created-ser",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: Kubernetes 1.24: Token-handling code assumes auto-created service account token secrets",
+    "description": "Kubernetes 1.24: Token-handling code assumes auto-created service account token secrets. This issue affects 38+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nStarting with Kubernetes 1.24, auto-generated service account token secrets are no longer created. Argo Workflows code that assumes these tokens exist will fail."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Kubernetes 1.24: Token-handling code assumes auto-created\u2026",
+        "description": "Update Argo Workflows to handle Kubernetes 1.24+ token changes. Instead of relying on auto-created token secrets, use projected volumes or manually create a service account token Secret:\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ServiceAccount\nmetadata:\n  name: argo-workflow-sa\n  namespace: argo-workflows\nsecrets:\n- name: argo-workflow-sa-token\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Kubernetes 1.24: Token-handling code assumes\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Updated token-handling code to not assume auto-created service account token secrets exist. For Kubernetes 1.24+, manually create a service account token Secret and reference it in the ServiceAccount spec.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "git reset HEAD~1 ;# change 1 to how many commits you made\ngit commit --signoff -m 'feat: my feat. Fixes #1234'",
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ServiceAccount\n.......\nsecrets:\n- name: the-secret-token-name"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Service",
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/8320",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/9620"
+    },
+    "reactions": 38,
+    "comments": 38,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
